name: djimitflo
description: Codex-native agent orchestration control plane for serious engineering teams
author: Dennis Landman

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/shared && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/telegram && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/agent-catalog && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/ransomware-module && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/server && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/dashboard
scripts.type-check: npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/shared && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/telegram && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/agent-catalog && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/ransomware-module && npm run type-check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/node_modules node_modules && find packages/*/src -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' -o -name '*.tsbuildinfo' | xargs rm -f
